description.disabledSummary: Automatic polling is off; you can still trigger a manual check.
description.enabledSummary: Automatic polling is on; review fetched announcements, manage unread state, and trigger a manual check.

empty.description: New announcements discovered by background checks will appear here.
empty.descriptionWhenPollingDisabled: You can check manually now; automatic polling can be managed in settings.
empty.filtered: No announcements match the current filters
empty.noAccounts: Add an account before checking announcements
empty.noAccountsDesc: Announcement checks need at least one enabled account to know which sites should be polled.
empty.title: No announcement records

messages.markAllReadFailed: Failed to mark announcements as read
messages.markReadFailed: Failed to mark announcement as read

status.unsupported: The latest check did not find a usable announcement endpoint for this site.
